resources.string: runway
Automatic GPX imports
Gadgetbridge folder
Connect this phone once, then choose the folder where Gadgetbridge saves your runs.
Folder
Device folder
Choose folder
Change folder
Choose folder again
Disconnect folder
Check now
Enable background checks
Disable background checks
Account connection
In runway, open Import and create a code for this phone.
Pairing code
Device name
Android phone
Connect account
Connecting…
Account connected for background imports.
This account connection expired or was disconnected in runway. Create a new pairing code to reconnect.
The account connection is saved, but runway could not be reached to check it.
That pairing code is invalid or expired.
The account could not be connected. Check the network and try again.
Android could not protect the connection on this device. Disconnect the device in runway before trying again.
Forget account on this device
Account connection removed from this device. Disconnect it in runway too if the phone is lost or no longer trusted.
Connect this phone to continue.
Account connected. Choose a folder next.
Folder access needs to be restored.
Ready to import new GPX files.
New files go to the runway activity inbox. You review them before they affect your plan.
Folder connected. Android read access is persisted.
Folder connected. Background checks are enabled.
Folder connected. Connect the account above before enabling background checks.
The saved folder needs permission again.
No folder connected.
Android did not grant persistent read access to that folder.
Folder access removed.
Folder check queued.
Automatic checks
Connect the account and folder to turn on background checks.
Background checks enabled. Android schedules them inexactly.
Background checks disabled.
No folder check has run yet.
Checking the folder now…
Folder check queued.
Last check added a GPX to the inbox.
Last check skipped GPX content already seen.
Last check held a GPX for manual review.
Last check found nothing new.
Checks stopped because the account connection is missing.
Checks stopped because folder access is missing.
The last check could not read this folder. Try Check now.
This folder has more than 10,000 files. Choose a dedicated Gadgetbridge folder.
Waiting for the newest GPX to stop changing.
The last check could not finish. Android will retry.
An old check stopped because the account or folder changed.
The folder check finished.
%1$s This folder is over the 10,000-file scan limit.
Back to runway
Open runway
Import GPX
Checking the shared file…
Connect this Android app from runway before sharing a GPX.
GPX added to the runway activity inbox.
This GPX is already in runway.
runway did not import this file. Open Import in runway, then upload it manually to review the problem.
The GPX could not be sent right now. Try sharing it again.
This share is not a readable GPX file.
This file is larger than the 10 MB import limit.
Close
